articles.title: TOP NEWS of July 10th: Mario Gila day. The Spaniard is a new player for Milan
articles.summary: News, curiosities, the voices of the protagonists and the latest market news on MilanNews.it.

articles.title: Oddo: "Camarda called me to ask me what I thought about Lecce, I told him he had done something stupid"
articles.summary: A few days ago Massimo Oddo said goodbye to Milan Futuro, leaving the role of coach of the Rossoneri Under 23 team.

articles.title: Aldo Serena: "Ramos is complete, he knows how to do everything. And Milan finally has a center forward of a certain quality"
articles.summary: This afternoon the official announcement arrived: Mario Gila is a new AC Milan player. The Spaniard signs until 30 June 2031 and arrives from Lazio for 27.5 million euros plus bonuses.

articles.title: Brambati rejects Cardinale: "I didn't like it, I felt like I was hearing an incompetent figure speak"
articles.summary: Speaking on the frequencies of TMW Radio, Massimo Brambati spoke in particular about Milan, focusing on Ruben Amorim and Gerry Cardinale, protagonists yesterday of the press conference to present the Portuguese coach.

articles.title: Atalanta: Ederson allegedly failed medical tests, move to United missed
articles.summary: (ANSA) - BERGAMO, JULY 10 - Despite the absence of the position and official notes of the two parties, the transfer of Ederson José dos Santos from Atalanta to Manchester United has fallen through.

articles.title: Galli's advance - Gila, Amorim and... Cardinale! Surprise, Milan is there
articles.summary: But wasn't Milan in chaos? The new coach Ruben Amorim has arrived, welcomed and introduced directly by the club's owner, Gerry Cardinale.

articles.title: Oddo promotes Navarro: "Nationality has nothing to do with it. He was responsible for important youth sectors"
articles.summary: A few days ago Massimo Oddo said goodbye to Milan Futuro, leaving the role of coach of the Rossoneri Under 23 team.

articles.title: World Cup: 2-1 against Belgium, Spain in the semi-final with France. Saelemaekers and De Winter eliminated
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, JULY 10 - Spain beats Belgium 2-1 (1-1) in the quarterfinals of the 2026 World Cup and qualifies for the semi-final, where they will face France.

articles.title: Pastore on midfield: "Rabiot-Modric is the starting pair for now, but things can change"
articles.summary: During the last episode of Cronache Mondiali, Giuseppe Pastore expressed his opinion on the merit of the Rossoneri's midfield for next season. These are his words.

articles.title: Letizia: "Getting up one morning madly infatuated with Milan is the simplest thing in the world, but we will evaluate Cardinale's performance in the difficulties"
articles.summary: Francesco Letizia, journalist, expressed himself as follows during his editorial on Sportitalia on Gerry Cardinale's new methods: "The objective is very clear: Milan wants to become great again, in the way they know how...

articles.title: MN - Vittori talks about Gila: "He is perfect for Amorim's game, he can play anywhere"
articles.summary: Mario Gila at Milan. The Spanish defender chose the Rossoneri, after negotiations conducted insistently between the AC Milan and Biancoceleste management.

articles.title: Oddo: "I didn't want to play D, Milan convinced me. We didn't return to C and I left"
articles.summary: A few days ago Massimo Oddo said goodbye to Milan Futuro, leaving the role of coach of the Rossoneri Under 23 team.

articles.title: Abate: "It's easy to choose Toro, I want a courageous team"

articles.summary: In his YouTube channel, Carlo Pellegatti talked about Adrien Rabiot, his performance against Morocco and his future. These are his words.

articles.title: Criscitiello on Modric: “Football is going in another direction, Modric is a phenomenon but we need to move forward”
articles.summary: During the latest Sportitalia live broadcast, director Michele Criscitiello expressed his opinion regarding Modric's future. These are his words.

articles.title: Oddo greets Milan Futuro: "Happy to have improved the boys, I saw a positive path. Several of them will start with the first team this year"

articles.title: Caldara analyses: “Modric in a 2-man midfield has to run much more, he could play the final parts of the match”

articles.title: Ravezzani on next season: “Caution is needed, meanwhile the purchasing campaign to date has been excellent”
